revision.text:

{{Object | Name=Jaguar XJ | Guid=3055-7749 | Deck=The Jaguar XJ is a British executive luxury sedan that was made from 1968 to 2019. | Characters=Characters/James_Bond | Concepts=Concepts/Jaguar_Cars_Ltd | Franchises= | Games=Games/007_First_Light,Games/Enthusia_Professional_Racing,Games/Gran_Turismo_2,Games/Overdrive_City,Games/Top_Drives | Locations=Locations/United_Kingdom | People= | Objects=Objects/Car,Objects/Sedan | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/137/1377390/3793666-img_3361.jpeg }}

{{Object | Name=Jaguar XK | Guid=3055-7774 | Deck=The Jaguar XK was a grand tourer model, available a coupe or convertible with a 8-cylinder model. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Jaguar_Cars_Ltd | Franchises= | Games=Games/Forza_Motorsport_2,Games/Gran_Turismo_5,Games/Gran_Turismo_6,Games/Need_for_Speed_Carbon,Games/Test_Drive_Unlimited,Games/Top_Drives | Locations=Locations/United_Kingdom | People= | Objects=Objects/Car,Objects/Jaguar_XK8,Objects/Jaguar_XKR_X100,Objects/Jaguar_XKR_X150,Objects/Sports_Car | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/137/1377390/3819261-img_3571.jpeg }}

{{Object | Name=Jaguar XKR X150 | Guid=3055-7773 | Deck=The Jaguar XKR X150 is a second generation of the sports version of the final project of concept model name, Advanced Lightweight Coupe. | Characters=Characters/James_Bond | Concepts=Concepts/Jaguar_Cars_Ltd | Franchises= | Games=Games/007_First_Light,Games/Forza_Motorsport_3,Games/Forza_Motorsport_4,Games/Forza_Motorsport_5,Games/Forza_Motorsport_6,Games/Gran_Turismo_5,Games/Gran_Turismo_5_Prologue,Games/Gran_Turismo_5_Prologue_Spec_III,Games/Gran_Turismo_6,Games/GT_Racing_Motor_Academy,Games/Need_for_Speed_Edge,Games/Need_for_Speed_Hot_Pursuit,Games/Need_for_Speed_Most_Wanted_2012,Games/Need_for_Speed_World,Games/Shift_2_Unleashed,Games/Test_Drive_Unlimited,Games/Test_Drive_Unlimited_2,Games/Top_Drives | Locations=Locations/United_Kingdom | People= | Objects=Objects/Car,Objects/Jaguar_XK,Objects/Sports_Car | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/137/1377390/3818829-img_3547.jpeg }}

revision.comment: Restore image alignment, sizes and captions from legacy source (3055-7392)
revision.text:
{{Object | Name=Lamball Mutton | Guid=3055-7392 | Deck=A food item in Palworld. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Lamball | Franchises= | Games=Games/Palworld | Locations= | People= | Objects= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/10/103881/3544264-lamball_mutton.png }}
==Overview== {{GBFigure|src=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/ignore_jpg_scale_small/10/103881/3544265-lamballmuttoningame.png|full=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/original/10/103881/3544265-lamballmuttoningame.png|align=right|width=320}} Lamball Mutton is a common consumable food item in Palworld. The item is dropped by [[Concepts/Lamball|Lamball]] and can be eaten raw or used in cooking recipes. ===In-Game Description===
Lamball meat. Red meat with a unique flavor. Delicious, but takes some getting used to.
===Stats=== * Weight - 1 * Nutrition - 37 ===Cooking=== Lamball Mutton can be used as a cooking ingredient in the following: * Grilled Lamball * Herb Roasted Lamball * Lamball Kebab

{{Object | Name=Lamborghini Gallardo | Guid=3055-7382 | Deck=Lamborghini Gallardo is a mid-sized supercar that was a cousin model to the Murciélago. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Licensed_Cars | Franchises= | Games=Games/Asphalt_6_Adrenaline,Games/Asphalt_Urban_GT,Games/Driver_San_Francisco,Games/Gran_Turismo_5,Games/Gran_Turismo_6,Games/Midnight_Club_3_DUB_Edition,Games/Midnight_Club_Los_Angeles,Games/Midnight_Club_Los_Angeles_Remix,Games/Need_for_Speed_Carbon,Games/Need_for_Speed_Carbon_Own_the_City,Games/Need_for_Speed_Hot_Pursuit,Games/Need_for_Speed_Most_Wanted,Games/Need_for_Speed_Most_Wanted_2012,Games/Need_for_Speed_ProStreet,Games/Need_for_Speed_Rivals,Games/Project_Gotham_Racing_4,Games/Real_Racing_3 | Locations=Locations/Italy | People= | Objects=Objects/Car,Objects/Sports_Car | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/137/1377390/3601821-img_2207.jpeg }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3601821-img_2207.jpeg","path":"137\/1377390\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_small,square_avatar,square_medium,scale_super,square_mini,square_tiny,scale_small,scale_medium,scale_tiny,scale_avatar,scale_large,screen_medium,screen_kubrick","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Lamborghini Gallardo is a mid-sized supercar that was a cousin model to the Murciélago.

<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' />

{{Object | Name=Lancia 037 | Guid=3055-7611 | Characters= | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games=Games/Michelin_Rally_Masters_Race_of_Champions | Locations= | People= | Objects= }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' />

{{Object | Name=Lancia Fulvia HF | Guid=3055-7616 | Deck=The Lancia Fulvia HF 1.6 was the final evolution of the Fulvia, and was a far more effective rally car. With its 5-speed gearbox and V4 engine it pushed out 120bhp in standard form. The Fulvia won multiple rallies before it was replaced by the revolutionary Stratos. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Lancia,Concepts/Licensed_Cars,Concepts/Rally,Concepts/The_1960s | Franchises= | Games=Games/DiRT_3,Games/DiRT_4,Games/DiRT_Rally,Games/Dirt_Rally_2_0,Games/EA_Sports_WRC,Games/Forza_Horizon_2,Games/Forza_Horizon_3,Games/Forza_Horizon_4,Games/Forza_Horizon_5,Games/Forza_Motorsport_6,Games/Forza_Motorsport_7 | Locations=Locations/Italy | People= | Objects=Objects/Car,Objects/Lancia_Stratos | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/151/1511438/3647291-1667168741-latest.jpg }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3647291-1667168741-latest.jpg","path":"151\/1511438\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_medium,square_small,square_avatar,scale_super,scale_small,scale_medium,square_tiny,square_mini,scale_avatar,scale_large,screen_kubrick,screen_medium","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> The Lancia Fulvia HF 1.6 was the final evolution of the Fulvia, and was a far more effective rally car. With its 5-speed gearbox and V4 engine it pushed out 120bhp in standard form. The Fulvia won multiple rallies before it was replaced by the revolutionary Stratos.

{{Object | Name=Land Rover Discovery | Guid=3055-7562 | Characters= | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games=Games/Need_for_Speed_III_Hot_Pursuit | Locations= | People= | Objects= }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' />

{{Object | Name=Latte | Guid=3055-7298 | Deck=Latte is a coffee made with espresso and steamed milk. | Characters= | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games=Games/Judgment,Games/Lost_Judgment | Locations=Locations/Europe,Locations/France,Locations/Italy,Locations/The_United_States_of_America | People= | Objects=Objects/Caffe_Mocha,Objects/Coffee,Objects/Coffee_Maker,Objects/Espresso,Objects/Milk,Objects/Water | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/8/82962/3507800-latte_art_3.jpg }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3507800-latte_art_3.jpg","path":"8\/82962\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_small,scale_small,scale_super,square_medium,square_avatar,scale_medium,square_mini,square_tiny,scale_large,scale_avatar,screen_kubrick,screen_medium","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Latte is a coffee made with espresso and steamed milk.

{{Object | Name=Lavender | Guid=3055-7717 | Aliases=Lavandula | Deck=Genus of 47 known species of perennial flowering plants in the sage family, Lamiaceae. It is native to the Old World, primarily found across the drier, warmer regions of the Mediterranean, with an affinity for maritime breezes | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Flower_Picking | Franchises= | Games=Games/Impostor_Factory,Games/Project_Zomboid,Games/Red_Dead_Redemption_II | Locations=Locations/Mediterranean_Sea | People= | Objects=Objects/Flowers | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/173/1734046/3762141-8527109889-250px.jpg }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3762141-8527109889-250px.jpg","path":"173\/1734046\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"scale_medium,scale_super,scale_small,square_small,square_medium,square_mini,square_avatar,square_tiny,scale_tiny,screen_medium,scale_avatar","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Genus of 47 known species of perennial flowering plants in the sage family, Lamiaceae. It is native to the Old World, primarily found across the drier, warmer regions of the Mediterranean, with an affinity for maritime breezes

revision.comment: Point cover at a rendition that actually serves
revision.text:

{{Object | Name=Macuahuitl | Guid=3055-7458 | Deck=A pre-Colombian Mezoamerican weapon consisting of a wooden club-like structure, embedded with obsidian blades at the sides. Usually described as a sword, club, or saw in modern era, although it isn't really any of those three. | Characters=Characters/Kotal_Kahn,Characters/Tyr_5443 | Concepts=Concepts/Blunt_Weapons,Concepts/Melee | Franchises= | Games=Games/Combate_Monero,Games/God_of_War_Ragnarok,Games/Mortal_Kombat_11,Games/Mortal_Kombat_Mobile,Games/Mortal_Kombat_X,Games/Tzompantli | Locations=Locations/Mexico,Locations/South_America | People= | Objects=Objects/Club,Objects/Mace | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/16/164924/3618586-6858936890-latest.png }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3618586-6858936890-latest.png","path":"16\/164924\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"square_medium,square_tiny,scale_super,square_small,square_avatar,scale_small,scale_medium,square_mini,scale_avatar,screen_kubrick,scale_large,screen_medium","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> A pre-Colombian Mezoamerican weapon consisting of a wooden club-like structure, embedded with obsidian blades at the sides. Usually described as a sword, club, or saw in modern era, although it isn't really any of those three.

{{Object | Name=Mashed Potatoes | Guid=3055-7364 | Deck=Mashed potatoes are a popular dish that combines potatoes, butter, milk/cream, and seasonings. | Characters=Characters/Lucy_MacLean | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games=Games/Marvels_Spider_Man_2,Games/Sandboxels | Locations=Locations/New_York_City,Locations/The_United_States_of_America,Locations/United_Kingdom | People= | Objects=Objects/Butter,Objects/Cream,Objects/French_Fries,Objects/Milk,Objects/Pepper_Shaker,Objects/Potato,Objects/Salt | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/8/82962/3519942-easy-homemade-mashed-potatoes_hero.jpg }}
